moments.title: Wimbledon Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The Championships, Wimbledon, the world's most prestigious tennis tournament, begins its 14-day run at the All England Club in London on Monday.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Get ready, tennis fans! Wimbledon 2026 serves up its first aces on Monday. Who are you backing for the Gentlemen's and Ladies' Singles titles?

angles.name: London Buzz
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream are on order! Wimbledon kicks off in SW19 on Monday, bringing two weeks of world-class tennis to London. Are you heading to the queues?

moments.title: UK Heatwave & Thunderstorm Warnings
moments.blurb: The UK is experiencing an exceptional heatwave with provisional record temperatures for June, alongside warnings for impactful thunderstorms across parts of England and Wales.

angles.name: Heat Alert
angles.copy: It's another scorcher! Red and Amber Extreme Heat warnings are in place across parts of the UK today with record June temperatures. Stay hydrated and stay safe!

angles.name: Thunderstorm Risk
angles.copy: The heatwave could break with a bang! Thunderstorm warnings are out for parts of the UK, bringing risks of heavy rain and lightning. Keep an eye on the forecast.

moments.title: Love Island UK: Casa Amor Imminent?
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island UK is approaching its halfway mark, with fans eagerly anticipating the return of Casa Amor in the coming days, expected around late June/early July.

angles.name: Casa Amor Watch
angles.copy: Is Casa Amor about to drop? Love Island fans are on high alert as the dreaded (or anticipated!) twist is expected in the villa any day now. Who do you think will have their head turned?

angles.name: Mid-Season Drama
angles.copy: The Love Island villa is heating up! With the series nearing its midpoint and Casa Amor rumours swirling, expect some serious drama this week. Who's your favourite couple (for now)?

moments.title: State Fayre Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The brand new State Fayre festival, billed as 'the UK's biggest music and BBQ festival' with an Americana theme, opens today at Hylands Park, Chelmsford, featuring headliners Kings of Leon and Alanis Morissette.

angles.name: New Festival Alert
angles.copy: Chelmsford, are you ready? The inaugural State Fayre festival kicks off today at Hylands Park, bringing Kings of Leon, Alanis Morissette and more for a weekend of music and BBQ!

angles.name: Americana Vibes
angles.copy: New festival alert! State Fayre is bringing Americana vibes to Chelmsford this weekend with Kings of Leon and Alanis Morissette headlining. Who's excited for some 'Redneck Woman' or 'Ironic' live?

moments.title: Runway Festival Opens
moments.blurb: Runway, the UK's first LGBTQ+ camping festival, begins today at a secret location in Gloucestershire, offering an immersive experience with artists like Gabrielle Kwarteng and Peach.

angles.name: Inclusive Festival
angles.copy: Making history this weekend! Runway, the UK's first LGBTQ+ camping festival, is now open in Gloucestershire. Celebrating queer culture with a fantastic lineup of artists!

angles.name: Weekend Escape
angles.copy: Looking for a unique festival experience? Runway Festival, the UK's first LGBTQ+ camping festival, is on this weekend in Gloucestershire. Expect an unforgettable immersive world!

moments.title: BST Hyde Park Begins
moments.blurb: British Summer Time Hyde Park kicks off its series of summer concerts tomorrow, June 27th, featuring a stellar lineup including Lewis Capaldi, Pitbull, and Mumford & Sons across weekends in June and July.

angles.name: Hyde Park Calling
angles.copy: London, get ready! BST Hyde Park starts tomorrow with a summer of incredible music. Lewis Capaldi, Pitbull, Mumford & Sons and more are set to grace the stage. Who are you seeing?

angles.name: Summer Concerts
angles.copy: The iconic BST Hyde Park series begins tomorrow! From pop anthems to rock legends, London's ready for a summer of unforgettable live music. What's on your playlist for the weekend?

moments.title: Football World Cup Continues
moments.blurb: The 2026 FIFA World Cup is currently underway, captivating football fans globally with matches continuing throughout the summer.

angles.name: World Cup Fever
angles.copy: World Cup fever is still gripping the globe! Who's impressed you most so far, and which nation do you think will lift the trophy?

angles.name: Football Summer
angles.copy: It's a football-filled summer! The World Cup continues, bringing daily drama and incredible goals. Are you glued to every match?

moments.title: New Official UK Singles Chart Out
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart is updated today, revealing the biggest songs in the country and any new entries or climbers.

angles.name: Chart Reveal
angles.copy: The new Official UK Singles Chart is OUT! Has your favourite made it to Number 1 this week, or is there a surprise new entry? Tune in!

angles.name: Weekend Playlist
angles.copy: Your weekend playlist just got an update! The Official UK Singles Chart is refreshed today. What tracks are you adding to your rotation?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Ariana Grande
moments.blurb: Pop superstar Ariana Grande celebrates her 33rd birthday today, June 26th.

angles.name: Pop Princess Bday
angles.copy: Big happy 33rd birthday to the one and only Ariana Grande! What's your favourite track from the pop superstar?

angles.name: Celebrating Ari
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy birthday to Ariana Grande today! From Broadway to global pop icon, she's done it all. What's your go-to Ariana anthem?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Chris Isaak
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Chris Isaak, known for 'Wicked Game', turns 70 today, June 26th.

angles.name: Wicked Game Bday
angles.copy: Happy 70th birthday to the legendary Chris Isaak! 'Wicked Game' still gives us chills. What's your favourite track from him?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Mick Jones
moments.blurb: Mick Jones, guitarist and vocalist for The Clash, celebrates his 71st birthday today, June 26th.

angles.name: Clash Guitar Hero Bday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 71st birthday to Mick Jones, the legendary guitarist from The Clash! What's your favourite punk anthem?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Nicole Scherzinger
moments.blurb: Former Pussycat Dolls frontwoman Nicole Scherzinger turns 48 on Sunday, June 28th.

angles.name: Diva Bday
angles.copy: Wishing a glamorous 48th birthday to Nicole Scherzinger on Sunday! From Pussycat Dolls to X Factor, she's a true star. What's your favourite Pussycat Dolls hit?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Katherine Jenkins
moments.blurb: Welsh mezzo-soprano Katherine Jenkins OBE celebrates her 46th birthday on Monday, June 29th.

angles.name: Welsh Voice Bday
angles.copy: Penblwydd Hapus to our very own Katherine Jenkins! The Welsh mezzo-soprano celebrates her 46th birthday on Monday. What's your favourite performance from her?

angles.name: Classical Crossover
angles.copy: Happy 46th birthday to the incredible Katherine Jenkins on Monday! A true Welsh icon. What's your favourite of her stunning classical crossover tracks?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Cheryl Ann Tweedy
moments.blurb: Pop singer and TV personality Cheryl Ann Tweedy (formerly Cole) turns 43 on Tuesday, June 30th.

angles.name: Girls Aloud Star Bday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 43rd birthday to the fantastic Cheryl Ann Tweedy on Tuesday! From Girls Aloud to solo hits, she's a pop legend. What's your favourite Cheryl track?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Deborah Harry
moments.blurb: Blondie's iconic frontwoman Deborah Harry celebrates her 81st birthday on Wednesday, July 1st.

angles.name: Blondie Icon Bday
angles.copy: Happy 81st birthday to the one and only Deborah Harry on Wednesday! The legendary Blondie frontwoman is forever iconic. What's your favourite Blondie hit?
